name: oms:trace
command:
Load the "trace" skill by calling the `skill-execute` tool with `{ "skill": "oms/trace" }`, then follow the skill's SKILL.md instructions to trace execution paths through code, recording call chains and state changes for the target below.

## Target

$ARGUMENTS
description: 执行路径追踪，记录调用链与状态变更。用法: /oms:trace <目标函数/入口/流程>
